description: When the user asks for a governance rule or invariant to be enforced, it must be processed through the Governance Promotion Cartridge: write invariant JSON, bind to a mapped gate, generate positive and negative tests, and only mark active after IAE proves ALLOW and DENY behavior.
activation_requirements: active status only after test proof

source_request.governance_text: When the user asks for a governance rule or invariant to be enforced, it must be processed through the Governance Promotion Cartridge: write invariant JSON, bind to a mapped gate, generate positive and negative tests, and only mark active after IAE proves ALLOW and DENY behavior.
